title: Smoked Mansaf Teriyaki
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Middle Eastern flavors, featuring a smoky mansaf teriyaki sauce over a bed of steamed egg.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, puree the soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, ginger, garlic, and sesame oil until smooth.
2. Add the smoked paprika and blend until well combined.
3. In a small saucepan, heat the blended sauce over medium heat.
4. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
5. Meanwhile, steam the eggs until cooked through.
6. In a separate pan, toast the mansaf until lightly browned.
7. To assemble, place a steamed egg on a plate, top with toasted mansaf, and drizzle with the warm teriyaki sauce.
10. Garnish with additional sesame seeds or chopped scallions, if desired.
